import fitz, sys
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Users/user/Desktop/업무/공장 협의 참고 전문자료/OpenProtocol_Specification_R_2_14_0_9836 4415 01.pdf'\)
# 처음 5페이지 텍스트

EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Users/user/Desktop/업무/공장 협의 참고 전문자료/OpenProtocol_Specification_R_2_14_0_9836 4415 01.pdf'\)
# MID 목록만 추출 \(목차에서\)
for i in range\(2, 10\):
    page = doc[i]
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    # MID 번호가 있는 줄만
    for line in text.splitlines\(\):
        if 'MID' in line and \('00' in line or '99' in line\):
            print\(line.strip\(\)\)
EOF)

        print\(text[:4000]\)
        print\(\)
EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import fitz, sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Users/user/Desktop/업무/공장 협의 참고 전문자료/OpenProtocol_Specification_R_2_14_0_9836 4415 01.pdf'\)

# MID 0014~0020 \(Parameter set\), MID 0034~0038 \(Job\), MID 0070~0073 \(Alarm\)
for i in range\(87, 100\):
    page = doc[i]
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    if any\(x in text for x in ['MID 0014','MID 0018','MID 0015','MID 0016']\):
        print\(f"=== PAGE {i+1} ==="\)
        print\(text[:3000]\)
        print\(\)
EOF)
